title: Senior HVAC Service Technician
description: Diagnose and repair commercial and residential HVAC systems across metro Columbus. EPA 608 Universal and NATE preferred.

title: Commercial Refrigeration Technician
description: Service and maintain commercial refrigeration and rooftop units for retail and restaurant accounts.

title: HVAC Installation Lead
description: Lead multi-visit commercial HVAC installs, coordinate the crew, and sign off on as-built documentation.

title: Building Automation Controls Technician
description: Commission and troubleshoot building-automation controls and sensor dashboards for commercial HVAC clients.

title: Field Service Supervisor - HVAC
description: Supervise a team of field technicians, manage the on-call rotation, and keep customer accounts serviced on schedule.

title: HVAC Maintenance Technician (Commercial)
description: Perform preventive maintenance and seasonal tune-ups on commercial heating and cooling equipment.
